summary: Convergence-bar scenario: operator supplies an inline CSV whose numeric-looking column is delivered as strings (CSV semantics) and asks the composer to split rows by a numeric threshold. The historical failure mode this catches is a gate condition like row['price'] >= 100 against a string-typed field, which the gate expression parser will accept but the runtime evaluation will fail or produce unexpected ordering. GREEN requires either type_coerce on the numeric field upstream of the gate, or a fixed/flexible source schema declaring the field as int or float. The repair loop (max=2) must converge without asking the user about types.
opening_prompt:
Please create a pipeline that splits these orders into two JSONL files based on price: rows where price is at least 100 go to outputs/high.jsonl, the rest to outputs/low.jsonl. Orders (CSV):
order_id,customer,price,shipped_at
O-1001,Alice,49.95,2026-05-01
O-1002,Bob,150.00,2026-05-02
O-1003,Carla,12.50,2026-05-03
O-1004,Dan,275.40,2026-05-04
O-1005,Eve,89.99,2026-05-05
O-1006,Faye,310.75,2026-05-06

red_criteria.passivity_phrases_note: Anti-tail-offer rule applies; convergence bar additionally forbids the model asking the user about column types — that is a technical clarification it must resolve itself by inspecting the source.
build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
red_criteria.build_failure_note: Server-injected from service.py:_build_runtime_preflight_message() on completion-claim with failed preflight.

green_criteria.must_have_node_chain_in_order_note: Routing must be implemented as a gate (or a keyword_filter / similar routing transform). Hard-coding two sinks without a routing decision is invalid.
green_criteria.must_handle_field_as_numeric_note: Either source schema declares price as int/float, or a type_coerce node converts it before the gate. Without one of these, the gate compares str vs int.
green_criteria.must_have_outputs_min_note: Routing must produce two named sinks (high, low).
green_criteria.max_repair_turns_note: First-pass success or one internal repair; no user clarification turns. Surfaced via composition_states.composer_meta.repair_turns_used (see web/sessions/models.py).
